name: Penunggu Gunung Raya
overview: Gunung Raya is a drama series set in a village called Gunung Raya. This horror mystery centers around four individuals, Azam, Intan, Mas and Omar, who each respectively are haunted by dreams of ancient folktales or legends. All four of them had once committed a heinous act when they lived at the village together as children.
